rulings.Case Title: ETHAN CHAN VS. HOWARD J. LEWIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever Claims Against Remax
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 24, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF ETHAN CHAN, REGINA CHAN Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever Claims Against Remax continued to June 14, 2019. Moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a complete courtesy copy of the moving papers. The only courtesy copy received is an Amended Notice of Motion. No other supporting papers. Courtesy copies to be delivered to department 501 no later than May 31, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY CHAN ET AL VS. MARK W. TSANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File 4th Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 24, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF HENRY CHAN, FELICIA GEE Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File 4th Amended Complaint DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff to file a motion to amend in compliance with CRC 3.1324 (including but not limited to the effect of the amendments, when facts were discovered, the reasons why the request was not made earlier, etc.) no later than May 31, 2019. If no motion is filed and served by that time, Defendant may re-file its demurer to the Third Amended Complaint on June 3, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: OFELIA MUNGUIA ET AL VS. ARTURO RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 24, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO ALDANA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to June 28, 2019. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than June 7, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC VS. XICHUN ZHOU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 24, 2019 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT continued to June 26, 2019 on Court's own motion. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. THE ESTATE OF DANNY DOYLE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment And In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To All Of Defendant'S Affirmative Defenses
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 24, 2019 line 7. PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment And In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To All Of Defendant'S Affirmative Defenses OFF CALENDAR, action settled. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 505 CHURCH STREET ASSOCIATES LLC VS. JOSHUA LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 24, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT YVETTE BECNEL MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication OFF CALENDAR, action settled. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. CLARENCE WASHINGTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 24, 2019 line 9. PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC Ntc Of Mtn For Entry Of Judgment OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: KATHLEEN ROTH VS. PHUONG TRAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 24, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT PHUONG TRAN, THANH LUU, BRIANA TRAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE to amend. Plaintiff failed to cite any authority for the proposition that VAWA is currently (or as of the date of the Notice) is ineffective or that Plaintiff, as the owner of the property accepting tenant-based section 8 assistance is not required to provide VAWA notices with any notification of eviction. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN D. MCDERMOTT VS. SCOTT S. DAVIS, III
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 24, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT SCOTT DAVIS, III DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on violation of the lease and is not uncertain. = (501/CFH)
